hero.name: Anup Bhaumik
hero.title: Full Stack Gen AI Developer
hero.description: I build scalable web applications, AI-powered SaaS products, browser extensions, and production-grade CRM systems. Specialized in developing Generative AI-integrated applications and integrating LLM-powered workflows into real-world products.

about.heading: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate engineer with a track record of building production-grade applications

cards.title: Who I Am
cards.content: A results-driven Full Stack Developer with 2.5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I specialize in React.js, FastAPI, Node.js, and integrating Open AI and Gemini API workflows into SaaS platforms and CRM systems.

cards.title: Experience
cards.content: Years of professional development experience across startups

cards.title: Projects
cards.content: Successfully delivered projects ranging from AI SaaS platforms to enterprise CRMs

cards.title: Current Focus
cards.content: Building Generative AI-integrated applications, automating data scraping pipelines, and designing scalable CRM synchronizations.

cards.title: Favorite Stack
cards.content: Technologies I enjoy working with the most

cards.title: Learning Goals
cards.content: Deepening expertise in advanced Prompt Engineering, AI Pipeline Design, and distributed message brokers like RabbitMQ and Celery.

cards.title: Engineering Philosophy
cards.content: Optimize for performance, such as reducing data scraping times by 75%. Build end-to-end scalable and maintainable solutions for fast-paced startup environments.

skills.heading: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to build modern applications

experience.heading: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey building production systems

items.description: Developed browser extensions, AI-powered CRM analysis pipelines, and integrated scalable async processing workflows for robust enterprise applications.
achievements: Developed a browser extension for LinkedIn using React.js and FastAPI backend integrated with Gemini API to scrape profiles and generate AI-powered outreach strategies, personality insights, and professional background analysis.
Reduced profile scraping time by 75% (~40s → 7–10s) by implementing asynchronous JavaScript scraping with parallel page processing.
Integrated AWS Cognito for secure user auth and Zoho Billing for subscription management (individual + enterprise plans).
Built an LLM-powered analysis pipeline using Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy to process lead records, enrich external business data, and auto-generate actionable sales intelligence reports.
Designed Celery + RabbitMQ + Redis workflows to handle bulk AI analysis of thousands of CRM leads without blocking API requests, managing LLM rate limits efficiently.
Integrated Zoho CRM APIs with OAuth 2.0 to retrieve leads, process through AI pipelines, and sync enriched data back into CRM fields automatically.
Built a React.js web console for account management, subscription upgrades, team collaboration, role-based access, and paginated analysis history dashboards.
Developed the company landing page using Astro with static site generation, achieving high Lighthouse scores and strong SEO performance.

Architected and deployed Hakura CRM in 2 weeks using ReactJS, NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma with JWT auth, RBAC, lead tracking, sales reporting, and an AI-powered news intelligence pipeline. Containerized with Docker and deployed on Railway.

items.description: Contributed to a healthcare platform serving doctors and franchisees, building data visualization dashboards and scheduling modules.
achievements: Contributed to a healthcare platform serving doctors and franchisees, building data visualization dashboards and scheduling modules.
Developed a Doctor Scheduling module and Franchisee Creation portal using React.js and Node.js.
Built interactive country-wise and state-wise product sales dashboards using React-Map and GeoJSON for geographic data visualization.
Enhanced dashboard functionality with new features improving operational efficiency for healthcare administrators.

projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've built across different domains, including enterprise and personal work

items.title: LinkedIn AI Chrome Extension
items.description: A browser extension for LinkedIn that scrapes profiles and generates AI-powered outreach strategies, personality insights, and professional background analysis.
items.problem: Sales and recruitment professionals need quick, automated insights and personalized outreach strategies directly from LinkedIn without manual data entry.
highlights: Reduced profile scraping time by 75% (~40s → 7–10s) by implementing asynchronous JavaScript scraping with parallel page processing.
Integrated AWS Cognito for secure user auth and Zoho Billing for subscription management (individual + enterprise plans).

items.title: Zoho CRM AI Intelligence Pipeline
items.description: An LLM-powered analysis pipeline that processes lead records, enriches external business data, and auto-generates actionable sales intelligence reports.
items.problem: Processing and analyzing thousands of CRM leads manually is time-consuming, requiring an automated system that handles rate limits without blocking.
highlights: Designed Celery + RabbitMQ + Redis workflows to handle bulk AI analysis of thousands of CRM leads efficiently.
Integrated Zoho CRM APIs with OAuth 2.0 to retrieve leads, process them, and automatically sync enriched data back into CRM fields.

items.title: Hakura CRM (Client Project)
items.description: A full-featured CRM system featuring lead tracking, sales reporting, revenue analytics, and an AI-powered news intelligence pipeline.
items.problem: The client required a scalable, secure, and fully functional CRM with AI capabilities architected and deployed under a tight 2-week deadline.
highlights: Architected and deployed the CRM in 2 weeks with JWT auth, RBAC, and integrated AI news intelligence.
Containerized the application with Docker and successfully deployed it on Railway.

items.title: Healthcare Management Dashboards
items.description: Data visualization dashboards and scheduling modules for a healthcare platform serving doctors and franchisees.
items.problem: Healthcare administrators needed an efficient portal to schedule doctors and visualize product sales geographically.
highlights: Developed a Doctor Scheduling module and Franchisee Creation portal.
Built interactive country-wise and state-wise product sales dashboards using React-Map and GeoJSON.

items.title: CLIPLY - Note-Taking & Productivity App
items.description: A full-stack productivity application featuring rich-text note editing, file uploads, task management, and structured note organization.
items.problem: Users need an organized platform to manage tasks and rich-text notes with persistent, secure storage.
highlights: Built full-stack app using NextJS, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and SQLAlchemy.
Developed RESTful APIs for notes, tasks, and file management with authentication and data validation.

items.title: DESTIFY - Hotel Booking Platform
items.description: Full-stack hotel booking web app with advanced filtering, booking management, and hotel listings.
items.problem: Travelers require a seamless hotel booking experience with secure authentication and robust filtering options.
highlights: Implemented NextAuth for secure authentication and Prisma ORM with MongoDB Atlas for type-safe operations.
Designed responsive UI with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI, and Radix UI components.

items.title: BINGO-25 - Real-Time Multiplayer Game
items.description: Real-time multiplayer Bingo game featuring live matchmaking and private room creation.
items.problem: Players need a responsive and interactive casual gaming platform for cross-device multiplayer experiences.
highlights: Developed with Socket.IO for live matchmaking and auto-matchmaking with strangers.
Built fully responsive UI optimized for mobile and desktop experiences.

education.subtitle: Academic background and continuous learning journey

items.description: Completed undergraduate degree in Computer Applications.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how I can help.
contact.ctaMessage: I'm currently available for new projects and collaborations. Whether you need a full-stack application, AI integration, or system architecture consultation — I'd love to hear about your project.

footer.name: Anup Bhaumik
footer.tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.
